seedanceSegments.title: Spicy mayo ribbon hook
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first opening on glossy spicy mayo, then a quick context anchor beside warm rice.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only, not camera framing. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead island shot view. Use @Whisk only as the small whisk reference, @Spoon only as the spoon reference, @CharacterSheet for character identity, and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @SpicyMayoRibbonFrame only as the target sauce texture: opaque orange, glossy, thick, pipeable. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, texture-first macro, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only sauce plop, whisk scrape, bowl set-down, sticky spoon lift. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s thick orange spicy mayo ribbon drops from a spoon; 1.0-2.1s hard cut to overhead sauce bowl beside warm rice on the same terrazzo island; 2.1-3.6s whisk erases red sriracha streaks into uniform orange gloss; 3.6-5.0s spoon lifts a clean ribbon with a soft peak. Scale lock: small sauce bowl about palm-width, spoon normal teaspoon size, sauce ribbon not a giant stream and not watery. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo countertop, same island layout, no redesigned kitchen. Global negatives: no sushi rolls, no ketchup look, no watery sauce, no text, no captions, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no extra hands.

seedanceSegments.title: Tofu cubes bake crisp
seedanceSegments.description: Pressed extra-firm tofu becomes 1-inch tamari-sriracha glazed cubes with browned crisp edges.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead for cold tofu prep shots. Use @OvenWide only for oven continuity, and @OvenCloseup only for the baked reveal. Use @SiliconeSpatula only for flexible bowl scraping and gentle tofu coating, @CharacterSheet for character identity, and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @BakedTofuCubesFrame only as the target baked state: 1-inch tofu cubes, browned crisp edges, not steaks, not crumbles. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only towel peel, soft knife taps, thin sauce splash, tofu tumble, tray scrape. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s towel pulls away from pressed tofu block; 0.8-1.8s tofu is cut into even 1-inch or 2.5 cm cubes; 1.8-2.6s tamari-sriracha glaze splashes onto cubes; 2.6-3.7s silicone spatula toss coats the cubes, optional cornstarch fully absorbed; 3.7-6.0s hard cut to oven/tray close-up with browned crisp-edged cubes sliding from the tray. Scale lock: tofu cubes stay 1 inch or 2.5 cm, roughly thumb-tip sized, not oversized blocks, not tiny dice. Utensil lock: silicone spatula is for coating only, not lifting hot tofu from the oven. Kitchen continuity lock: same light terrazzo island for prep, same oven/kitchen identity for reveal. Global negatives: no raw flour patches, no tofu steaks, no tiny crumbles, no flames, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Shortcut sushi rice shine
seedanceSegments.description: Warm cooked rice absorbs vinegar, sugar, and salt and becomes glossy, then lands in one serving bowl.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead island view. Use @Spoon only for folding rice, @CharacterSheet for character identity, and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @SeasonedRiceShineFrame only as the target rice texture: warm sticky grains, glossy vinegar sheen, soft clumps, not dry. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only bowl set-down, vinegar splash, rice fold, spoon drop. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s warm cooked rice steams in a wide bowl; 1.0-2.1s clear rice vinegar stream pours over rice; 2.1-3.8s spoon folds until grains become glossy and clump softly; 3.8-5.0s one mound drops into a 16 to 18 cm serving bowl and fills the bottom third. Scale lock: serving bowl is 16 to 18 cm diameter, rice fills bottom third only, not a flat plate, not an overflowing pot. Kitchen continuity lock: preserve light terrazzo island and overhead composition. Global negatives: no dry chalky rice, no soup, no sushi rolls, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Fresh topping cuts
seedanceSegments.description: Avocado, mango, cucumber, and scallions become readable color-block toppings.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead island shot view. Use @cutting_board only as the cutting board reference and @chef_knife only as the knife reference. Use @CharacterSheet for character identity and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @FreshToppingPrepFrame only as the target topping layout: avocado fan, juicy mango cubes, cucumber coins, scallion rings. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only cutting board set-down, soft avocado cut, juicy mango cuts, crisp cucumber taps, quick scallion taps. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s cutting board context with avocado, mango, cucumber, scallions; 0.8-1.8s half avocado fans into clean green slices; 1.8-2.7s mango becomes juicy 1.5 cm orange cubes; 2.7-3.6s Persian cucumber becomes thin wet coins; 3.6-5.0s scallions become tiny green rings in a controlled pile. Scale lock: per bowl uses half avocado, half mango, half Persian cucumber; mango cubes about 1.5 cm, cucumber coins thin, scallions small garnish pile, not full salad coverage. Kitchen continuity lock: same terrazzo island, overhead prep angle. Global negatives: no browned avocado, no mango-tofu confusion, no garnish confetti, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Pink pickles and nori crackle
seedanceSegments.description: Optional radishes become bright pink pickles, and nori is locked as thin crackly strips.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead island shot view. Use @SaucepanLarge only as the brine saucepan shape, @Spoon only as the lifting utensil, @CharacterSheet for character identity, and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @PinkRadishJarFrame only as the target pickled state: thin bright pink crisp slices in clear brine. Use @NoriStripsFrame only as target nori shape: dry black strips 2 to 4 mm wide, not whole wrappers. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only jar clink, clear brine pour, wet radish lift, nori crackle. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s saucepan and jar establish quick pickle setup; 1.0-2.2s clear brine pours over thin radish slices; 2.2-3.6s hard cut to bright pink pickled slices lifted from brine; 3.6-5.0s nori crumbles into thin black strips. Scale lock: radish slices are paper-thin, six to eight slices later per bowl; nori strips are 2 to 4 mm wide, not full sheets, not sushi roll wrappers. Kitchen continuity lock: same terrazzo island and overhead view. Global negatives: no full nori sheet in bowl, no purple soup, no boiling violence, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Build the sushi bowl
seedanceSegments.description: Rice base receives tofu, avocado, mango, cucumber, ginger, and pink radishes in readable sections.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead bowl-building view. Use @Tongs only as the placement utensil, @Spoon only for rice support if needed, @CharacterSheet for character identity, and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @SushiBowlAssemblyFrame only as target topology: one 16 to 18 cm bowl with rice base and distinct topping sections. Use @BakedTofuCubesFrame only to preserve 1-inch browned tofu cubes. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only bowl settle, tofu taps, avocado slide, fruit and cucumber drop, delicate garnish placement. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.8s one serving bowl centered with rice filling bottom third; 0.8-1.7s eight to ten browned 1-inch tofu cubes tumble onto one side; 1.7-2.6s half-avocado fan slides beside tofu; 2.6-3.7s mango cubes and cucumber coins fill separate bright sections with a hard cut if needed; 3.7-5.0s pickled ginger curls and six to eight pink radish slices are placed as accents. Scale lock: one 16 to 18 cm bowl, not a platter; tofu 8 to 10 cubes; half avocado, half mango, half cucumber; radishes six to eight slices, not full coverage. Kitchen continuity lock: same terrazzo island overhead, no restaurant table. Global negatives: no sushi rolls, no salad mound, no confetti toppings, no oversized tofu, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Sauce and garnish payoff
seedanceSegments.description: Opening spicy mayo returns as a controlled zigzag, followed by nori, sesame, and microgreens.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead as the active overhead garnish view. Use @Spoon only if a sauce spoon is visible, @CharacterSheet for character identity, and @PoseTopDown for visible hands. Use @SpicyMayoRibbonFrame only as sauce texture continuity from segment-01. Use @NoriStripsFrame only for thin black nori strips. Use @FinalSushiBowlHeroFrame only as final topping organization reference. Generate exactly 4 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only sauce squeeze, nori crackle, seed sprinkle, soft greens drop. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.4s spicy mayo zigzags over the bowl, about 1 to 2 tablespoons, not flooding; 1.4-2.5s thin black nori strips fall lightly; 2.5-3.6s small pinch of sesame seeds rains onto glossy sauce; 3.6-5.0s one small microgreens tuft lands near the rim without hiding toppings. Plating quantity lock: sauce 1 to 2 tablespoons, nori light handful of 2 to 4 mm strips, sesame small pinch, microgreens one small tuft, not full salad coverage. Kitchen continuity lock: same terrazzo island overhead. Global negatives: no sauce flood, no whole nori sheets, no salad mound, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.title: Final bite and Licorn satisfaction
seedanceSegments.description: Final bowl hero, spoon bite, macro texture tour, and satisfied Licorn character in the kitchen.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide as structural Licorn kitchen context only. Use @KitchenIslandDefault as the active final hero kitchen view. Use @Spoon only as the eating spoon, @CharacterSheet for Licorn identity, @PoseThreeQuarterLeft for character body orientation, and @CharacterExpressions for satisfied expression. Use @FinalSushiBowlHeroFrame only as target final bowl state: one organized 16 to 18 cm sushi bowl, rice base, tofu, avocado, mango, cucumber, radish, nori, sesame, microgreens, orange spicy mayo. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only bowl settle, spoon drag, sticky rice lift, subtle bowl scrape, gentle satisfied spoon tap. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.1s finished bowl on Licorn island, all topping sections readable; 1.1-2.3s spoon gathers sticky rice, one tofu cube, avocado, mango, cucumber, nori, sauce; 2.3-3.6s spoon lifts the perfect bite close to camera with sauce glint; 3.6-4.9s macro texture tour across crisp tofu, creamy avocado, juicy mango, cucumber, pink radish, sesame, nori; 4.9-6.0s Licorn character visible behind bowl, satisfied and proud. Kitchen continuity lock: light terrazzo counter, same cabinet layout, no restaurant table. Global negatives: no mouth close-up, no sushi rolls, no chopsticks required, no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music.

seedanceSegments.risk: Final shot can drift into sushi rolls, restaurant plating, or character-only reaction; keep the bowl in foreground and kitchen references active.
seedanceSegments.audioPrompt: ceramic bowl settle; spoon drag through sticky rice; soft sticky lift; subtle bowl scrape; gentle satisfied spoon tap
